sec_auth: === Screen: Sign In and Sign Up ===
auth_sub_login: Sign in to save your progress.
auth_sub_forgot: We will send a verification code to your email.
auth_sub_reset: Enter the code sent to your email and create a new password.

auth_link_to_login: Already have an account? Sign in
auth_err_email_before_code: Enter a valid email before requesting a code
auth_err_pass_len: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth_err_conn: Could not connect to server. Make sure it is running.
auth_err_req_code: Could not request code. Try again later.
auth_err_new_pass_len: New password must be at least 6 characters
auth_err_reset: Could not reset password. Try again later.
auth_ok_reset: Password reset successfully. Sign in with your new password.
ins_no_data_sub: Keep learning so AI can\ncreate personalized insights
cs_need_topic: Enter a topic to generate cards
cs_ai_prompt: Create 5 study cards on topic "{topic}". Return JSON in format: {"cards": [{"term": "...", "definition": "..."}, ...]}. JSON only, no explanations.
csg_fill_next: Fill title, course and tags on the next step
csg_then_ai: Then AI will create cards automatically

srs_saved_hint: Summary already saved in AI Notebook!
sts_clear_desc:
This will delete all statistics from the database:

• Study time
• Quiz history
• Topic progress
• Streak will be reset

This action cannot be undone!
pln_del_ok: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"?

tut_clear_chat_q: Are you sure you want to clear chat history? This action cannot be undone.
tut_ai_empty: AI returned an empty response. Try rephrasing your question.
tut_conn_err: Could not connect to server. Check your internet connection.
tut_auth_err: Authorization error. Please sign in again.
tut_limit_err: AI usage limit reached. Try later or upgrade subscription.
tut_ai_empty_err: AI couldn't generate an answer. Try rephrasing.
tut_generic_err: Sorry, failed to get a response. {error}
onb_welcome_d: Turn summary photos into cards and tests. Study smarter, not harder.
onb_record_d: Our AI assistant listens to lectures for you and highlights the key points.
onb_ai_d: Get a short summary, key points, and ready notes after each recording.
pmg_desc_active: Thanks for supporting AIStudyMate. We keep adding new features for productive learning.
pmg_desc_free: Upgrade to Premium: 100 photos/day, 20 recordings up to 2 hours, PDF export, Telegram bot, AI Insights, and priority AI access.
pmg_all_avail: All Premium features are available. Share feedback — your opinion matters.
pmg_feat_photo_d: Add up to 100 photos daily for all your materials.
pmg_feat_rec_d: AI recorder with advanced features and transcription.
pmg_feat_pdf_d: Save materials for printing and easy sharing.
pmg_feat_tg_d: Messenger integration for quick access to materials.
pmg_feat_ins_d: Smart recommendations and detailed progress analysis.
pmg_feat_prio_d: Faster responses and priority request processing.
pmg_pay_change_d: Update card or switch to another plan.
pmg_extend_d: Choose the best plan and activate Premium.
pmg_pause_soon: Subscription pause will appear in next update.
pmg_what_in_a: You get unlimited summaries workflow, export options, smart recorder, and priority support.
pmg_cancel_a: Yes, you can cancel anytime. Premium remains active until the paid period ends.
pmg_new_a: We constantly add new tools: collaboration, advanced reports, and platform integrations.
pmg_renew_d: Billing controls will be available in-app soon. For now, set a reminder before your period ends — we’ll send instructions by email.
pmg_renew_notice: We’ll notify you closer to subscription end.
